episodes.title: Epstein Survivor Dani Bensky: “The Cover-Up Is Deep” — Inside the Fight To Expose the Epstein Files
episodes.description:
Epstein survivor Dani Bensky joins the show to discuss what survivors believe is an ongoing cover-up surrounding the Epstein files — and why many victims feel the truth is still being withheld from the public.
Bensky explains how survivors have been working with lawmakers to push for transparency and accountability, arguing that systemic failures allowed abuse to continue for years despite warnings and complaints. She describes meeting with members of Congress and pushing for legislation aimed at reforming statutes of limitations and ensuring investigations move forward.
The conversation also explores claims that key documents may still be hidden or redacted, how survivors are navigating political divisions in Washington, and why many believe the investigation into Epstein’s network is far from finished.
This is independent journalism. Subscribe to support our work.
